mnemonics: Differently Simple Trees Provide Necessary Computation
Powers of Algorithms Never Produce Complete Results
keyPoints: Decision Trees are a type of algorithm used for solving problems in a systematic way
P (Pseudo-Polynomial time) problems are those that can be solved in polynomial time but with a degree that can be higher than the input size
NP-Complete problems are a class of problems where an optimal solution is known to exist but finding the optimal solution is computationally infeasible
